_comment_1: num_items: Number of items to learn per daily session (default 10).
_comment_2: primary_key: Data field name used as the primary key to mark completion (e.g. 'word', 'id'). If null, it auto-detects the first key of your data.
_comment_3: subject_name: Display name of the subject (e.g., 'Japanese N5', 'History'). Can be left null.
